name: Deviled Codfish Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Cod fillets, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen fish.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (hot).
3. Grease baking sheet.
4. Add fish to boiling, salted water. Cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cook for 4 minutes or until fish flakes easily. Drain and flake.
5. Remove bones, if present.
6. Mix fix with breadcrumbs and parsley.
7. Mix salad dressing (mayonnaise), egg, mustard, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper thoroughly. Stir into fish mixture.
8. Mix well.
9. Form into 12 patties about 3 inches in diameter and 3/4 inch thick on baking sheet. Sprinkle with paprika.
10. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
Calories per serving (2 patties): About 235
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
